AllowedOrigins:comment: Replace with your actual domain(s) before deploying to production. In development, CORS is configured for localhost automatically (see Program.cs).
ForwardedHeaders:comment: Configure trusted reverse proxies or ingress CIDR ranges before deploying behind a load balancer.

ForwardedHeaders.KnownProxies:comment: Add trusted proxy IPs, for example 127.0.0.1 or your load balancer address.
ForwardedHeaders.KnownNetworks:comment: Add trusted CIDR ranges, for example 10.0.0.0/8 for an internal ingress network.
